title: stelis intermedia
intro: Stelis intermedia, also known as the yellow bee orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Stelis intermedia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
